title: Release Gates, Migration, Recovery, Support, and Defense · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs release gates, migration, recovery, support, and defense from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for production release, rollback, and residual-risk defense after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Require schema, order, duplication, source, model, algorithm, native GUI, accessibility, performance, security, package, and learner-flow gates.
Compare behavior, saves, settings, key maps, artifacts, and accessibility across upgrades with rollback-safe migrations.
Rehearse corrupted state, cancelled work, missing resources, display failure, bad release, rollback, and last-good restoration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Production Defense, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, solve one convenient seeded maze, omit revision, coordinate and wall invariants, topology oracle, frontier trace, changed algorithm or heuristic, callback ownership, keyboard and structured-text access, native Tk evidence, failure, recovery, and package transfer, then accept a screenshot as maze proof.

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Production Defense
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Production Defense: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review puzzle team handles case 3745 during a keyboard-only puzzle tournament. Build deterministic Python evidence to defend release evidence, migrations, recovery rehearsals, support ownership, and residual risk; all graph claims need an independent witness; then replace pointer input with a single-action keyboard path. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Defend player value, algorithms, accessibility, correctness, performance, security, packaging, recovery, and residual risk together.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Production Defense.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Production Defense, keep Production Defense connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend player value, algorithms, accessibility, correctness, performance, security, packaging, recovery, and residual risk together.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Production Defense, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Production Defense precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Production Defense, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A review puzzle team handles case 3745 during a keyboard-only puzzle tournament. Build deterministic Python evidence to defend release evidence, migrations, recovery rehearsals, support ownership, and residual risk; all graph claims need an independent witness; then replace pointer input with a single-action keyboard path. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Defend player value, algorithms, accessibility, correctness, performance, security, packaging, recovery, and residual risk together.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Record what required effort · Review Production Defense, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: A correct solver is sufficient evidence for a production learning project.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The decision applies Release Gates to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Release Gates.
